_what_this_is: Hard-exclude company list per career calibration brief 2026-05-16. Companies in this list are auto-trashed at scan time, before any triage or eval LLM call fires (zero spend on excluded items). Used by scripts/process-all-council-intel.mjs, the triage scoring formula in modes/_shared.md, and any future agent that scores roles against Mitchell's preferences.

_how_to_use.categories: Each top-level key is an exclusion category (defense, gambling, fossil_fuels, etc.). Add new categories as Mitchell's preferences evolve.
_how_to_use.companies: Each category has a 'companies' array. Slugify with: lowercase, non-alphanumeric runs → single hyphen, trim hyphens. 'Palantir Technologies' → 'palantir'. 'Shield AI' → 'shield-ai'.
_how_to_use.match_strategy: Match against the slugified version of the company name in the JD or pipeline entry. Exact match on the slug. Add explicit aliases under 'aliases' if a company appears under multiple names.
_how_to_use.auto_update: Agents may APPEND to this list when council intel surfaces fresh exclusion-worthy signals (e.g., a company pivots into defense contracting). Always use scripts/agent-commit.mjs for the commit so the audit trail is clean. NEVER remove an entry without Mitchell's explicit instruction.

_calibration_reference: Per data/career-calibration-20260516-190152.md: 'Defense contractors (Palantir, Anduril, Shield AI) are hard-excluded.' Mission/money slider = 3 (money dominates) but ethical hard-excludes still apply absolutely.

defense.rationale: Defense contractors are hard-excluded per Mitchell's explicit calibration (2026-05-16). This is not a mission/money tradeoff — these companies do not pass the filter at any comp level.
